zh.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: 英國威爾斯丹比爾萊可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margred Rhys Moethe Verch於1417年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾萊可哈姆時，她的父親Richard Rhys Moythe38歲，母親Margaret deHarley38歲。她和Sir Knight Mathew Goch至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1443年在英國英格蘭爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margred Rhys Moethe Verch于1417年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾萊可哈姆时，她的父亲Richard Rhys Moythe38岁，母亲Margaret deHarley38岁。她和Sir Knight Mathew Goch至少有9个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1443年在英国英格兰爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Göthe): from a short form of the personal name Godo, formed with the ancient Germanic element god, got ‘god’.
South German (also Göthe): relationship name or nickname from Middle High German göte ‘godfather’.

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margred Rhys Moethe Verch was born in 1417, in Wrexham, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Rhys Moythe, was 38 and her mother, Margaret deHarley, was 38. She had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Knight Mathew Goch. She died in 1443, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margred Rhys Moethe Verch est née en 1417, à Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Rhys Moythe, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret deHarley, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Knight Mathew Goch. Elle est décédée en 1443, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margred Rhys Moethe Verch 1417 in Wrexham, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Rhys Moythe 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret deHarley 38. Sie hatte mit Sir Knight Mathew Goch mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1443 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margred Rhys Moethe Verchが1417年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアウレクスハムで生まれた時，父Richard Rhys Moytheは38歳，母Margaret deHarleyは38歳であった。彼女はSir Knight Mathew Gochとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1443年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margred Rhys Moethe Verch(이)가 1417년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 레스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Rhys Moythe(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret deHarley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Sir Knight Mathew Goch(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.
